channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS

item.author: @Space_Station

item.title: what are you building with codex?
item.author: @gdb

item.title: I’ve done it and never regretted it.
item.author: @tunguz

item.title:
Brevity and clarity is what’s missing in most writing..
I’ll go weeks without writing something pub...
item.description:
Brevity and clarity is what’s missing in most writing..
I’ll go weeks without writing something publicly because I feel like I’m putting the onus of my muddy thoughts on the reader.
The best writing is able to communicate cleanly the crux of the matter and share a thread that’s simmering but not explored fully.
Writing is still easier since you can edit and reframe anytime. I’m in awe of folks who are able to speak clearly and on the spot on any topic.
One day I hope to get there 🤞
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 154
item.author: @nikunj

item.title: GPT-5.5 raises the ceiling of ambition for what you can do with AI:
item.author: @gdb

item.title:
AI 界面设计的三个被忽视的环节
最近看 Vitaly Friedman 在 Smashing Magazine 的文章，发现了一个有意思的现象：大多数聊天机器人的体验都很糟糕，但问题根本不在 AI...
item.description:
AI 界面设计的三个被忽视的环节
最近看 Vitaly Friedman 在 Smashing Magazine 的文章，发现了一个有意思的现象：大多数聊天机器人的体验都很糟糕，但问题根本不在 AI，而在我们怎么设计和它的交互。
文章梳理了三个关键环节。首先是输入层面，用户往往要费力表达意图，所以可以用预设提示、语音输入、查询构建器来降低门槛。其次是输出呈现，文本和列表远远不够，要通过可视化和交互形式让人更快抓住重点。最重要的是第三个环节：微调。
我发现微调才是最容易被忽视也最容易出问题的地方。很多产品让用户用自然语言反复描述修改需求，这简直是噩梦。反而用传统的滑块、旋钮、按钮这些老家伙会直观得多。想象一下，用 Moodboard 式的界面让用户直接点击要改的部分，然后局部调整，而不是全局重写 prompt。
还有个对我启发很大的点：别迷恋"AI 优先"。很多产品把 AI 当卖点硬塞进去，不如考虑"AI 辅助"，在用户真正工作的地方才能发挥价值。
原文链接：https://t.co/q4vFUBNNSP
--- @bearliu | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 266
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: This is what conviction looks like. https://t.co/mpDXx9obbv
item.author: @binance

item.title: I crossed 100K followers on X and walked the red carpet at the TIME 100 gala as a TIME 100 AI honore...
item.description:
I crossed 100K followers on X and walked the red carpet at the TIME 100 gala as a TIME 100 AI honoree.
What a week.
Claude and I have decided the only logical next step is 100 lotto tickets. If I win big, I’ll give $1000 to one of you in the replies.
The community is the whole thing. Thank you for showing up here every day.
--- @alliekmiller | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 7 | 👁 412
item.author: @alliekmiller

item.title: Maybe he’s actually not good at making deals.

item.title: 为什么你应该关注我@Jason_Young1231 1. 我不靠推文流量赚钱，原因是曝光一直不达标 2. 我和各大厂商都没有合作关系，原因同上 3. 我的推文对你有用的可能性微存 4. 我的头像...
item.description:
为什么你应该关注我@Jason_Young1231 1. 我不靠推文流量赚钱，原因是曝光一直不达标 2. 我和各大厂商都没有合作关系，原因同上 3. 我的推文对你有用的可能性微存 4. 我的头像是小岛秀夫，小岛秀夫谁不爱呢
--- @Jason_Young1231 | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 441
item.author: @Jason_Young1231

item.title: A girl I met in college almost completely ruined my life.
item.author: @tunguz
